task:
Krita is open with /home/user/Documents/illustration.kra loaded — four paint layers named 'Sky', 'Mountains', 'Trees', and 'Character'.

Reorganize the layer stack so that:
- 'Sky' and 'Mountains' are nested inside a new group layer named exactly 'Background_Elements'
- 'Trees' and 'Character' are nested inside a new group layer named exactly 'Foreground_Elements'
- 'Foreground_Elements' sits above 'Background_Elements' in the layer stack

Do not delete or rename any of the four original paint layers. Save the file in place at /home/user/Documents/illustration.kra.

verification.eval: any(l.get('full_path')=='Background_Elements/Sky' for l in result) and any(l.get('full_path')=='Background_Elements/Mountains' for l in result)
verification.description: Sky and Mountains nested under Background_Elements

verification.eval: any(l.get('full_path')=='Foreground_Elements/Trees' for l in result) and any(l.get('full_path')=='Foreground_Elements/Character' for l in result)
verification.description: Trees and Character nested under Foreground_Elements

verification.eval: [l['name'] for l in result if l.get('node_type')=='grouplayer'][:2] == ['Foreground_Elements','Background_Elements']
